Overview

Mobile app
Microsoft 365 apps
News and tips
FAQ
See plans and pricing
Overview
Your Outlook can change everything
Key benefits
Get more from Outlook
Copilot in Outlook
Previous
Next
Together in one place
See everything you need to manage your day in one view. Easily stay on top of emails, calendars, contacts, and to-do lists—at home or on the go.
Connect your accounts
Access personal, work, or school emails in the Outlook app on desktop and mobile, including Outlook.com, Gmail, Yahoo!, iCloud, and other mail services.
Write more effective emails
Help keep your sentences concise and polished with suggestions as you write, plus intelligent spelling and grammar checks.
3
Easily access your files
Quickly send, edit, or read a document on the go. Use Word, Excel, or PowerPoint from your inbox, and securely link to your OneDrive files.
Protect your mailbox
With enterprise-grade security, Outlook scans attachments and links for threats.
4
Encryption prevents forwarding of sensitive information.
5
Organize your day
Schedule events, track packages and flights,
3
and set reminders to help you stay on task.
Prioritize what matters to you
Remove clutter with focused inbox and sweep features. Put emails on snooze and flag important messages.
From first thought to ready-to-send
Tell Copilot what you want to say. It drafts your email and helps refine the tone, length, and clarity. You decide when it's ready to send.
Try Copilot in Outlook
Catch up on long conversations
Stay on top of long threads (and spend less time in your inbox) by having Copilot summarize key details and any questions specific to you.
Send emails with confidence
Ensure your emails have the right clarity, length, and tone so you come across the way you intended.
Now included in Microsoft 365
Supercharge your Microsoft 365 experience with AI. Copilot is included with a Microsoft 365 Personal or Family subscription, giving you powerful AI in your favorite apps, including Outlook.
3
,
6
Copilot in Outlook currently works with outlook.com, hotmail.com, live.com, and msn.com email addresses.
Learn more

Manage what’s important with Outlook. Whether it’s different email accounts, multiple calendars, or signing that form, Outlook has you covered - at home, for work, or on-the-go.

For business

Monthly
Outlook
Free

For 1 person
Outlook email and calendar on web, desktop, and mobile apps
Core Outlook security features like spam filters
15 GB of mailbox storage
More information

5 GB of
cloud storage

/year

cloud storage

/year

Word, Excel,
More information

PowerPoint, Outlook and OneNote desktop apps with Microsoft Copilot
More information

More information
Employer must have an enterprise subscription that includes Microsoft 365 desktop apps and have multi account access enabled (excludes government tenants). Applies to select AI features in Word, Excel, PowerPoint and Outlook desktop apps and in select mobile apps. See details at https://aka.ms/EmployerEnterpriseSub.
Higher usage for AI image creation and editing in Microsoft Designer, Photos, and Copilot chat
More information
AI features only available to subscription owner and cannot be shared; usage limits apply. Learn more. Minimum age limits may apply to use of AI features. https://aka.ms/AIFeatureSeeDetails

More information

OneDrive ransomware protection for your photos and files
Microsoft Teams with Copilot
More information

to call, chat, and collaborate
Ongoing support for help when you need it
Apps with subscription value
Microsoft Copilot: ​Reimagine what’s possible with your everyday AI companion.
Word: Create impressive documents and improve your writing with built-in intelligent features.
Excel: Simplify complex data and create easy-to-read spreadsheets.
PowerPoint: Easily create polished presentations that stand out.
Outlook: Manage your email, calendar, tasks, and contacts together in one place.
OneNote: Meet all your notetaking needs with one cross-functional notebook.
OneDrive: Save, access, edit, and share files and photos wherever you are.
Microsoft Defender: Get threat prevention and detection with Microsoft Defender security capabilities.
Microsoft Teams: Bring everyone together in one place to meet, chat, call, and collaborate.
Designer: Create, design, and edit any graphics you can imagine with no experience required.
Microsoft Clipchamp: Create and edit professional-looking videos with easy-to-use tools.
Microsoft 365 Family
$129.99
/year
Subscription automatically renews unless canceled in Microsoft account.
See terms
.
Buy now
Try for free
For 1 to 6 people (AI features for subscription owner only)
Each person can use on up to 5 devices simultaneously
Works on PC, Mac, iPhone, iPad, and Android phones and tablets
More information
App availability varies by device/language. Features vary by platform.

analysis.name: Microsoft 365 (Outlook)
analysis.tagline: Your inbox, organized. Your day, planned.
analysis.value_proposition: Unified email, calendar, contacts, and files across personal and work accounts with AI-powered writing and triage via Copilot.
analysis.target_segment: consumer + enterprise (dual-market: home users and Microsoft 365 business/enterprise)
analysis.ideal_customer: Users already in the Microsoft ecosystem (Windows, Office, OneDrive) who want a single client to manage multiple email accounts with AI assistance

features.name: unified inbox
features.description: Manage multiple email accounts in one place across desktop, mobile, and web
features.evidence_quote: Stay on top of multiple accounts with email, calendars, and contacts in one place

features.name: multi-account support
features.description: Connect Outlook.com, Gmail, Yahoo!, iCloud, and other mail services
features.evidence_quote: Access personal, work, or school emails... including Outlook.com, Gmail, Yahoo!, iCloud

features.name: calendar
features.description: Integrated calendar for scheduling events and meetings
features.evidence_quote: email, calendars, and contacts in one place

features.name: contacts
features.description: Integrated contacts management
features.evidence_quote: email, calendars, and contacts in one place

features.name: to-do lists
features.description: Task and to-do list integration alongside email and calendar
features.evidence_quote: emails, calendars, contacts, and to-do lists—at home or on the go

features.name: desktop app
features.description: Native desktop clients for Windows and Mac
features.evidence_quote: Outlook for Windows / Outlook for Mac

features.name: web app
features.description: Browser-based Outlook client
features.evidence_quote: Outlook for Web

features.name: mobile app
features.description: iOS and Android mobile apps
features.evidence_quote: Outlook for Mobile

features.name: ai email drafting
features.description: Copilot drafts emails from a prompt with tone/length/clarity refinement
features.evidence_quote: Tell Copilot what you want to say. It drafts your email and helps refine the tone, length, and clarity

features.name: ai thread summarization
features.description: Copilot summarizes long email threads and pulls out questions specific to the user
features.evidence_quote: having Copilot summarize key details and any questions specific to you

features.name: ai tone coaching
features.description: Copilot Coaching ensures emails have the right clarity, length, and tone
features.evidence_quote: Ensure your emails have the right clarity, length, and tone

features.name: spelling and grammar check
features.description: Intelligent spelling, grammar, and writing suggestions
features.evidence_quote: suggestions as you write, plus intelligent spelling and grammar checks

features.name: onedrive file integration
features.description: Send and securely link OneDrive files from inbox
features.evidence_quote: securely link to your OneDrive files

features.name: office document editing
features.description: Open and edit Word, Excel, PowerPoint attachments from inbox
features.evidence_quote: Use Word, Excel, or PowerPoint from your inbox

features.name: attachment threat scanning
features.description: Enterprise-grade security scans attachments and links for threats
features.evidence_quote: Outlook scans attachments and links for threats

features.name: email encryption
features.description: Encryption prevents forwarding of sensitive information
features.evidence_quote: Encryption prevents forwarding of sensitive information

features.name: focused inbox
features.description: Automatic inbox filtering separating important from clutter
features.evidence_quote: Remove clutter with focused inbox and sweep features

features.name: sweep
features.description: Bulk cleanup of emails from a sender
features.evidence_quote: Remove clutter with focused inbox and sweep features

features.name: snooze
features.description: Put emails on snooze to defer them
features.evidence_quote: Put emails on snooze and flag important messages

features.name: flag messages
features.description: Flag important messages for follow-up
features.evidence_quote: flag important messages

features.name: package tracking
features.description: Automatically track packages from email
features.evidence_quote: Schedule events, track packages and flights

features.name: flight tracking
features.description: Automatically track flights from email
features.evidence_quote: track packages and flights

features.name: reminders
features.description: Set reminders on emails and events
features.evidence_quote: set reminders to help you stay on task

features.name: shared calendar
features.description: Share calendars with others for coordination
features.evidence_quote: Shared calendar

features.name: delegate access
features.description: Share and delegate mailbox and calendar access
features.evidence_quote: Share & delegate

features.evidence_quote: Copilot is included with a Microsoft 365 Personal or Family subscription

features.description: Jira Cloud for Outlook official add-in
features.evidence_quote: Organize your team's work without leaving your inbox

features.name: zoom integration

features.evidence_quote: Add Google Meet video meetings in Outlook

features.evidence_quote: Turn conversations into action items in Asana

differentiators: Copilot AI built into email drafting and thread summarization
Multi-account aggregation including Gmail/Yahoo/iCloud in one client
Enterprise-grade security with attachment threat scanning and encryption

recent_ships.what: Copilot in Outlook drafting, coaching, and thread summarization
recent_ships.source: landing: 'Copilot is included with a Microsoft 365 Personal or Family subscription'
docs: 'Get started with the new Outlook for Windows'

recent_ships.what: End of support announced for Outlook 2016 and Outlook 2019
recent_ships.source: docs: 'End of support for Outlook 2016 and Outlook 2019'

praised: Copilot AI drafting when it works
complaints: Frequent global outages: 'Microsoft 365 outage disrupts Outlook and Teams, affecting thousands'
Outages affect Outlook, Teams, and Loop simultaneously
'Microsoft Office 365 Outlook automatically enabled Clutter weeks ago' — surprise feature changes
Reliability issues surface repeatedly on HN

free_tier.limits: Free Outlook.com account with basic email, calendar, contacts; ads shown; Copilot not included

tiers.name: Free (Outlook.com)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Free web/mobile Outlook with basic mail, calendar, contacts; ad-supported

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Personal
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1 user, Outlook + Office apps, 1TB OneDrive, Copilot included

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Family
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 6 users, Outlook + Office apps, 1TB OneDrive each, Copilot included

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Business Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: Web/mobile Office apps, Outlook, Teams, 1TB OneDrive (annual commitment)

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Business Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: Desktop Office apps, Outlook, Teams, 1TB OneDrive

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Business Premium
tiers.headline_inclusions: Business Standard + advanced security, device management, Intune

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 Apps for Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: Desktop Office apps + Outlook + OneDrive, no Teams

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 E3 (Enterprise)
tiers.headline_inclusions: Enterprise Office + Outlook + advanced compliance and security

tiers.name: Microsoft 365 E5 (Enterprise)
tiers.headline_inclusions: E3 + advanced analytics, threat protection, voice

pricing.notes: Business tiers require annual commitment or ~20% monthly premium; 300-seat cap on Business plans (above requires Enterprise E3/E5); Copilot for M365 add-on is $30/user/month on top of business SKUs; pricing page returned 404 during scrape so tiers are from public Microsoft pricing knowledge, not the live compare-all-plans URL
